description: The Brotherhood of Eternal Love was an organization of drug users and distributors operating from the mid-1960s through the late 1970s in Orange County, California. Founded by John Griggs, it produced and distributed LSD and hashish with the goal of sparking a 'psychedelic revolution' in the United States. The group was known for the 'Orange Sunshine' LSD tablets and assisted Timothy Leary's escape from prison. Its activities largely ended after a 1972 drug raid, though some members were arrested as late as 2009.
